因此，这个 Logo 是我的个人符号，也是我的技术态度。它代表我对机器人系统的理: This logo is both my personal symbol and my technical attitude. It reflects how I understand robotic systems: caring about low-level hardware while valuing upper-layer software, pursuing engineering implementation while keeping creativity and curiosity alive. It compresses my name, technical direction, and personal temperament into a concise geometric mark.
向上的结构感，代表技术方向、持续成长和向上探索。: The upward structure represents technical direction, growth, and exploration.
开放而有连接性的轮廓，象征协作与对外部世界的感知。: The open connected outline suggests collaboration and perception of the outside world.
稳定的支撑模块，代表硬件、系统架构与工程实现能力。: The stable support module represents hardware, system architecture, and engineering implementation.
绿色是这个 Logo 的主色。相比冷硬的工业色彩，绿色更强调成长、生命力与持续迭: Green is the main color of this logo. Compared with colder industrial colors, it emphasizes growth, vitality, and continuous iteration. Robotics is not only mechanics, code, and circuits; it also carries perception, action, and feedback from the real world. For me, green represents the state of debugging, optimizing, and moving forward step by step.
这个 Logo 以我的名字 Tung Chia-hui 的首字母 T / C /: This logo centers on the initials T / C / H from my name, Tung Chia-hui, and blends them into a cube-like geometric structure. It is more than a simple monogram: the upward T acts like a main axis for technical direction, growth, and exploration; the C forms an open frame that suggests connection, collaboration, and perception; the H becomes a stable support module for hardware, system architecture, and engineering implementation.
Tung Chia-hui 个人 LOGO 介绍：以 T / C / H 为核心: Tung Chia-hui personal logo: a green geometric mark built around T / C / H.
一个把名字、机器人方向和工程气质压缩在一起的绿色几何符号。: A green geometric symbol that compresses my name, robotics direction, and engineering temperament into one mark.

早上好，先找到今天的节奏。: Good morning. Start by finding today's rhythm.
上午好，适合做一点需要专注的事。: Good morning. This is a good time for focused work.
中午好，慢一点也没关系。: Good noon. It is okay to slow down a little.
下午好，把下一步打开就行。: Good afternoon. Just open the next step.
晚上好，收束今天，也留点余地。: Good evening. Wrap up today and leave some room.
夜深了，做完这一件就早点休息。: It is late. Finish this one thing and rest soon.
